modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User encounters a blank page after signing into Lawrence.

full_description_text: User reports a blank page appears after signing in. No error message is shown. The home directory on Lawrence seems to be missing. This issue may be affecting access to necessary files.

description: User reports a blank page appears after signing in. No error message is shown. The home directory on Lawrence seems to be missing. This issue may be affecting access to necessary files.
